nasb.text: Therefore He will give them up until the time When she who is in labor has borne a child. Then the remainder of His brethren Will return to the sons of Israel.

esv.text: Therefore he shall give them up until the time when she who is in labor has given birth; then the rest of his brothers shall return to the people of Israel.

cnv.text: 因此，耶和華必把以色列人交給敵人， 直到那要生產的婦人生下孩子來； 那時，他其餘的兄弟， 就必歸回以色列人那裡。

ccb.text: 耶和华要将以色列人交给他们的敌人， 直到那临盆的妇人生下儿子。 那时，祂流亡的弟兄将重返他们的以色列同胞那里。
